• The AMI (66%) and Anemia (63%) conditions resulted in larger losses in historical occurrences 

For the subset of beneficiaries with an “ever” date in both the 27 and 30 CCW Chronic Condition files, the CCW team 
compared the first occurrence dates between the two files to determine whether they were identical. Beneficiary 
counts are in Table 3 of Appendix B. We graphically depict the difference in the “ever” dates for beneficiaries in both 
files to illustrate the magnitude of change
